inputs.label: Turkey Weight
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of the turkey before cooking, without giblets.

inputs.label: Oven Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Set temperature of the oven. Standard roasting temperature is 175°C (350°F).

inputs.label: Stuffed
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether the turkey cavity is filled with stuffing. Stuffed turkeys require longer cooking to ensure safe internal temperature.

inputs.label: Starting Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Initial temperature of the turkey. Typically refrigerated at 4°C.
